name: Mrs Fields Linzer Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 150°C. In a medium bowl, combine flour, ground almonds, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon with a wire whisk. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, cream butter and sugar. Add egg yolks, vanilla, and almond extracts, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy. Gradually add the flour mixture and blend at low speed until just combined. Roll dough into 1 1/2 inch balls. Place them 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet. Using your index finger, press an indentation in the center of each ball to hold filling. Bake for 22-24 minutes or until golden brown on the bottom. Transfer cookies to a cool, flat surface. In a small bowl, combine jam and grated lemon peel. Place half a teaspoon of the filling mixture in the center of each cooled cookie. For an extra decorative touch, sift confectioners' sugar over the cookies and place sliced almonds in the jam filling.
